title: Tangent lower-floor capacity-edge row
short: Generic moving-root tangent floor gives 256 bad slopes one step below capacity.
label: theorem-backed scanner row
proof: The generic moving-root tangent floor gives LD_sw(C,a) >= n-a+1 for all k+1 <= a <= n. At a=257 this gives at least 256 support-wise MCA bad finite slopes, and the certificate scanner verifies 256/17^32 > 2^-128.
nonclaims: Finite-slope support-wise MCA lower floor only; not an exact threshold, not ordinary list decoding, and not protocol soundness.

title: Cycle116 closed-threshold proof record
short: ABF printed closed threshold at delta = 125/256.
label: proof record
proof: Cycle116 agreement-262 transfer reaches the printed ABF closed support threshold. The weaker >2^-128 gate is independently unconditional via the moving-root tangent floor, which gives LD_sw(C,262) >= n-a+1 = 251 >= 7 with no Cycle84 census input.
nonclaims: The >2^-128 gate and delta*_C <= 125/256 conclusion are unconditional via the tangent floor; the printed 52,747,567,092 numerator and ~2^-95 density still import the Cycle84 finite count. Not ordinary list decoding; not protocol soundness; not exact delta*_C.

title: Cycle119 strict263 proof record
short: Two-ended upgrade with one-symbol strict margin.
label: proof record
proof: Two-ended locator theorem: common top-six coefficients plus common nonzero constant coefficient. The weaker strict >2^-128 gate is independently unconditional via the moving-root tangent floor, which gives LD_sw(C,263) >= n-a+1 = 250 >= 7.
nonclaims: The strict >2^-128 gate and delta*_C <= 249/512 conclusion are unconditional via the tangent floor; the exact 52,747,567,092 numerator and ~2^-95 density still import the Cycle84 finite count. Finite/source-scoped; not an official prize solve by itself.

title: Strict264 quotient-floor proof record
short: Quotient-core entropy plus deep-point conversion gives at least nine bad slopes.
label: proof record
proof: Quotient map x -> x^8 on |H|=512 gives an augmented C+ list of size binom(64,33); deep-point conversion yields at least nine support-wise noncontained slopes at agreement 264.
nonclaims: Quotient-core mechanism record superseded as a lower-bound frontier by the generic tangent floor, which gives LD_sw(C,264) >= 249.

title: High-agreement tangent exact gate
short: Tangent-star classification pins the finite-slope threshold at agreements 506/507.
label: exact gate
proof: Generic moving-root tangent floor gives LD_sw(C,a) >= n-a+1 for all k+1 <= a <= n; the common residual budget proves equality when 3a-2n >= k, and the tangent-star refinement classifies extremizers. For n=512,k=256 this gives LD_sw(C,506)=7 and LD_sw(C,507)=6, with no seventh finite-slope branch at a>=507.
nonclaims: Finite-slope support-wise MCA convention for this row; adjacent high-agreement CA/projective/curve/list ledgers are recorded separately, and protocol/folding/query/challenge-field losses remain conditional.

title: Strict352 quotient-core proof record
short: Dyadic quotient-core floors give at least seven bad slopes through agreement 352.
label: proof record
proof: Dyadic quotient maps x -> x^c with c in {4,8,16,32}, quotient-prefix pigeonholing, and quantitative deep-point conversion give LD_sw(C,a) >= 7 for 264 <= a <= 352, with LD_sw(C,352) >= 16.
nonclaims: Quotient-core mechanism record superseded as a lower-bound frontier by the generic tangent floor, which gives LD_sw(C,352) >= 161 and LD_sw(C,353) >= 160.

title: Strict264 2187-slope candidate
short: Candidate subpacket shape if the hinted strict264 target is validated.
label: candidate
proof: Candidate target; requires independent theorem and admissibility audit.
nonclaims: Do not cite as proved without a proof record.

title: Reserve-scale sigma = 16 (proved, subsumed)
short: Deeper finite-slack rung, now subsumed by proved tangent and strict352 floors.
label: subsumed proof record
proof: The moving-root tangent floor gives LD_sw(C,272) >= n-a+1 = 241; strict352 also gives a much larger quotient-core lower bound through this agreement. Since floor(17^32/2^128)=6, this clears the prize gate without a special reserve272 search.
nonclaims: Subsumed lower-bound row, not an independent reserve-scale mechanism. Finite-slope support-wise MCA convention.

title: Reserve-scale sigma = 32 (proved, subsumed)
short: Deeper below capacity, now subsumed by proved tangent and strict352 floors.
label: subsumed proof record
proof: The moving-root tangent floor gives LD_sw(C,288) >= n-a+1 = 225; strict352 also covers this agreement. Since floor(17^32/2^128)=6, this clears the prize gate.
nonclaims: Subsumed lower-bound row, not an independent reserve-scale mechanism. Finite-slope support-wise MCA convention.

title: n/log n scale sigma ~= 57 (proved, subsumed)
short: Closer to the local-limit reserve scale, now covered by proved lower floors.
label: subsumed proof record
proof: The moving-root tangent floor gives LD_sw(C,313) >= n-a+1 = 200; strict352 also covers this agreement. Since floor(17^32/2^128)=6, this clears the prize gate.
nonclaims: Subsumed lower-bound row, not an independent n/log n local-limit theorem. Finite-slope support-wise MCA convention.
